title: Pull-to-search with magnifying spring
design_brief: Search bar grows from a magnifying icon when pulled. Reference: Arc Search mobile pattern.
mobile_reasoning: Icon scale + search width interpolated from overscroll.

stylesheet_strategy.constants: Component-level sizing, spacing, and hit-target constants are named instead of hidden in inline styles.
stylesheet_strategy.platform_differences: iOS and Android keep the same behavior; platform-specific shadow/elevation or picker APIs are isolated at the edge.
stylesheet_strategy.responsive_strategy: Layout uses available width, safe-area padding, and minimum 44px targets so phone and tablet density stay usable.

animation_strategy: Interpolation.
gesture_strategy: Inherits scroll.
accessibility_considerations: Gesture-only behavior is mirrored by accessibilityActions and a visible label.
performance_notes: Gesture values stay on the UI thread through shared values; React state is not updated per frame.
what_makes_this_native: Uses native platform primitives rather than web-only assumptions, so touch, keyboard, safe areas, and accessibility stay coherent.

what_makes_this_native: Uses native platform primitives rather than web-only assumptions, so touch, keyboard, safe areas, and accessibility stay coherent.

title: Annotated event line on time-series
design_brief: Time-series chart with vertical lines marking events (e.g., 'launched feature X').
mobile_reasoning: Skia line at event x + label.

stylesheet_strategy.constants: Component-level sizing, spacing, and hit-target constants are named instead of hidden in inline styles.
stylesheet_strategy.platform_differences: iOS and Android keep the same behavior; platform-specific shadow/elevation or picker APIs are isolated at the edge.
stylesheet_strategy.responsive_strategy: Layout uses available width, safe-area padding, and minimum 44px targets so phone and tablet density stay usable.

animation_strategy: Values reveal with one timing curve and retain stable labels so the animation explains change rather than hiding it.
gesture_strategy: Tap or focus a data mark to expose the exact value; the semantic legend mirrors the same interaction for screen readers.
accessibility_considerations: Chart has an image summary plus focusable legend rows, so the data is understandable without color or touch precision.
performance_notes: Geometry is memoized and Skia renders marks on the native canvas, avoiding React work during interaction.
what_makes_this_native: Uses native platform primitives rather than web-only assumptions, so touch, keyboard, safe areas, and accessibility stay coherent.

title: Vapor wave: pink/purple gradient, retrofuturist
design_brief: Pink/purple/cyan vapor wave aesthetic. Reference: indie music apps.
mobile_reasoning: Multi-color linear gradient + chrome text.

stylesheet_strategy.constants: Component-level sizing, spacing, and hit-target constants are named instead of hidden in inline styles.
stylesheet_strategy.platform_differences: iOS and Android keep the same behavior; platform-specific shadow/elevation or picker APIs are isolated at the edge.
stylesheet_strategy.responsive_strategy: Layout uses available width, safe-area padding, and minimum 44px targets so phone and tablet density stay usable.

animation_strategy: Motion is bounded, cancellable, and tied to state changes the user can understand.
gesture_strategy: Primary action is exposed through a Pressable with an accessibility action, with gestures treated as acceleration only.
accessibility_considerations: Every primary operation has a visible label, 44px target, and non-gesture path.
performance_notes: Hot-path work is kept outside render loops; state updates happen only on committed user-visible changes.
what_makes_this_native: Uses native platform primitives rather than web-only assumptions, so touch, keyboard, safe areas, and accessibility stay coherent.
